title: TanStack Query — Adopción de defineEntityQueries en 20+ hooks
highlights: 20+ hooks de listado/detalle migrados al contrato `defineEntityQueries` + `queryOptions()` v5
Fetchers colocalizados con el tipado inferido end-to-end
`detail` marcado como opcional en el helper — habilita hooks solo-lista
Retro-compatibilidad de keys legacy preservada (bookingKeys.byForklift, supplierBillKeys, returnInspectionKeys)
modules: Maintenance: useMechanics, useActiveMechanics, useMaintenancePolicies, useMaintenanceLogs (filtro forkliftId)
Invoices: useInvoices, useInvoice, usePayments (filtro invoiceId), useCreditNotesForInvoice (filtro invoiceId)
